shot_type_and_framing: close-up, centered framing of the white marble plate with sweets, positioned slightly lower in the frame to show background elements
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with a medium focal length to capture shallow depth of field, softly blurring the background while keeping the sweets and plate in sharp focus
environment_description: a warm, intimate setting with an orange-red fabric surface, illuminated clay oil lamps and scattered marigold flowers
subject_description: a white marble plate with an engraved golden floral pattern holding two brown round sweets and three white square sweets arranged neatly
motion_behavior: static, natural stillness reflecting a calm and serene environment
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, realistic, premium, filmic with warm tones and soft textures
